_comment_titles: Job titles to search. Use full titles as they appear on job boards. Add as many as needed. Examples: 'IT Delivery Manager', 'Program Manager', 'Technical Project Manager'
_comment_locations: City and state to search. Format: 'City ST'. Add multiple to cast a wider net. Examples: 'Boston MA', 'Worcester MA', 'Providence RI'
_comment_require_title_keywords: At least ONE of these words must appear in the job title or the result is dropped. This keeps noise out. Case-insensitive. Tune this list if you are getting unrelated results.
_comment_max_days_old: Drop any listing older than this many days. Also maps to the JSearch date_posted bucket (<=3 -> 3days, <=7 -> week, <=30 -> month). Recommended: 14. Set to 30 if volume is too low.
_comment_job_type: Set to 'full_time' to keep only full-time roles (applied as a post-fetch filter on the JSearch job_employment_type field). Leave as empty string '' to return all types.
_comment_pages: Max pages of JSearch results to fetch per title+location query. Each page returns up to 10 results via cursor pagination. Start with 2. Increase if you are not seeing enough listings.
_comment_min_salary: Salary floor is configured privately in your .env file as MIN_SALARY=100000. It is intentionally excluded here to protect salary negotiation position.
_note_min_salary: See .env file — set MIN_SALARY to your minimum acceptable salary.
